en:
Blesses the target with divine power.

Temporary increase of STR, DEX, INT and HIT. Versus Undead property and Demon race
Bestia halves their DEX and INT instead.

A passive ward that shields the master from harm.

The Master and his Bestia can start to cook meals on fire places. These meals apply
certain buff effects when they are eaten.

`-10%/lv` cooking time
`+10%/lv` success chance
Restores a small amount of health to the target.
A weak fire spark that scorches the target.
A basic physical charge attack.

Hurls a bolt of searing fire at a single enemy.

Must be channelled - moving or taking damage interrupts the cast.

Enables the use of the basic user interface.

Lv.1 Allows to trade with other players.
Lv.2 Allows to chat with other players via public and whisper chat.
Lv.3 Allows to express emotes.
Lv.4 Allows sitting to double HP & Mana recovery.
Lv.5 Allows to join and create parties.
Lv.6 Allows to use trade posts.
Lv.7 Allows the user to perform the "Master Ritual".

Feigns death to avoid menace of nearby enemies. This skill can be switched on and off.

After performing the ritual to become a Bestia Master this skill can not be used anymore.

Apply bandages to a Bestia and channel a healing effect over 10s. The cooldown of this
skill is 5 minutes. A Bestia can only receive a single First Aid every 60 secs.

`+20%/lv` HP healed or `+100 HP/lv` healed

Automatically enabled once Lv. 7 in Basic Skill is reached. Can only be used as long as
you are a Novice. Converts 25 Void Essence, 5 Mana Dust and 3 Clay into a Seal of Mastery.

Allows you to construct useful items of daily use and structures which can be placed in
the world.

`+5%/lv` success chance
`+10 item lv/lv` of items that can be produced, up to item level 100+ at max rank

You are very skilled in working with tools and raw material. Building structures in the
world is very quick for you and the Bestia under your command.

`-10%/lv` construction time of structures

You are able to rework items to put slots in them in which runes can be slotted.
Requires an Engraving Set which will be consumed in the process.

Enables the smith to refine the finest ores. A must have to produce the raw materials
for weapon or armor forging.

`+30 ore lv/lv` that can be refined, up to ore level 90+ at max rank

Able to forge weaponry from raw ingredients. Higher skill level unlocks forging
higher-level weapons.

The counterpart to Blacksmith: forges plate, mail and shields from smelted ingots.
Higher skill level unlocks forging higher-level armor.

You can repair damaged or broken equipment to refurbish and make it usable again.
Higher levels unlock repairing equipment of a higher item level.

`+20 item lv/lv` of equipment that can be repaired, up to item level 100+ at max rank

Deeper knowledge of weapons and armor that raises the odds of successfully refining
either one further after forging. If an upgrade fails the equipment can be destroyed.

`+4%/lv` success chance when upgrading a weapon or armor

The capstone of the forge. Makes a Blacksmith's hands steady enough to trust with the
rarest ore.

`+5%/lv` Weapon/Armor forging chance
`+5%/lv` upgrade chance

Build and operate Mana Harvesters which channel mana from the environment into raw
crystals - the source of magic for many use cases.

Level 1 enables you to place a Mana Harvester
`-5%/lv` harvesting time
`+3%/lv` crystal yield

Refine the raw and unstable mana crystals harvested by a Mana Harvester into the finest
arcane raw materials used to build powerful magic artifacts.

`-4%/lv` chance a crystal shatters during refinement
Higher levels unlock refining higher-grade crystals

Create runes from Bestia essences. These runes are imbued with the power of the Bestia
and can be slotted into a weapon or piece of equipment that has been prepared with Item
Customization. An attempt to convert a Bestia into an essence destroys the Bestia.

`+5%/lv` chance of success

Can create magic artefacts by binding sustained enchantments to an item, going well
beyond what a single etched rune can hold.

`+4%/lv` enchantment chance
`-7%/lv` chance to destroy the item if the binding fails

Teaches which roots, herbs and mana-touched growth are worth the harvest, and how to
keep them potent until they reach the cauldron.

Lv.1 Can collect herbs up to level 20
Lv.2 Can collect herbs up to level 40
Lv.3 Can collect herbs up to level 60
Lv.4 Can collect herbs up to level 80
Lv.5 Can collect herbs up to level 100+

The core craft of the Alchemist: brewing reagents down into potions, tonics and other
consumables. Builds directly on what Herbalism teaches about picking the right ingredient.

Lv.1 Can craft basic potions and elixirs up to level 10 at a workbench cauldron.
Lv.2 Can craft potions and elixirs up to level 20.
Lv.3 Can craft potions and elixirs up to level 30.
Lv.4 Can craft potions and elixirs up to level 40.
Lv.5 Can craft potions and elixirs up to level 50. Failed brews return half of the raw
reagents used instead of losing them entirely.
Lv.6 Can craft potions and elixirs up to level 60.
Lv.7 Can craft potions and elixirs up to level 70.
Lv.8 Can craft potions and elixirs up to level 80.
Lv.9 Can craft potions and elixirs up to level 90.
Lv.10 Can craft potions and elixirs up to level 100+, unlocking the highest-level potion
and elixir blueprints.

The Alchemist's capstone. Where Alchemy brews what nature already provides,
Transmutation reshapes mundane matter itself into the rare magically-infused resources
needed for strong artifact creation and weapon refinements.

Higher levels unlock transmuting higher-grade infused resources
Increased yield and success chance for Alchemy.

Your Bestia and Master gain an increased HP and Mana regeneration rate.

`+3% effect/lv`

Your Bestia and Master gain an increased tolerance against high and low environment
temperatures.

`+3%` higher tolerance/lv

You and your Bestia know every kind of terrain.

`+3%` higher movement speed/lv

With this skill you are able to catch fish. Fish can be cooked and are used for food and
trading.

`+20 fish lv/lv` that can be caught, up to fish level 100+ at max rank

The player is able to gather wood resources faster.

`-3%/lv` wood gathering time
`+2%/lv` resource drop chance

Sets snares and deadfalls that keep working for the master even while they're off doing
something else, passively catching small game over time for meat and pelts on a later
check-in.

`+4%/lv` chance a snare yields a catch
Higher levels unlock snares for larger game

Bestia under your control gain faster experience and require less food to maintain their
stamina out in the open.

`+5%/lv` EXP gain
`-2%/lv` stamina loss

Detailed knowledge of the Bestia and their behavior makes it easier for you to tame and
catch them.

`+5%/lv` chance to tame

Raises the carrying capacity of your own Master.

`+10%/lv` weight limit

Raises the carrying capacity of every Bestia under your control.

`+10%/lv` weight limit

Enables the player to chart unexplored land, revealing terrain that can be shared,
traded on, or built on.

Each level reduces the difficulty of surveying unexplored land.

Hardens the master and their Bestia against travel through hostile terrain, far from the
comfort of a settlement. Reduces the stamina and HP drain caused by hostile terrain and
environmental hazards.

`-10%/lv` stamina drain in hostile terrain
`-10%/lv` environmental hazard damage

An instinct for reading the sky and wind well before a storm ever arrives, letting the
Prospector plan a route or a dig around what's coming.

`+5min/lv` how far ahead upcoming weather changes can be sensed. Level 1 shows you the
current wind direction and speed.

Specialized in digging mine shafts and gathering mineral resources.

Level 1 enables you to place a mining shaft
`-10%/lv` mining time
`+20 resource lv/lv` that can be mined, up to resource level 100+ at max rank

Turns the rough gemstones a Miner digs up into cut stones fit for an Artificer's socket
or a Trader's scale. Can cut raw gems recovered from mining into faceted gemstones,
increasing their value and unlocking their use in socketed equipment.

Higher levels unlock cutting higher-grade gems
`-8%/lv` chance to shatter a gem while cutting

Lets a Miner push shafts deeper than good sense would recommend, into ground that pays
off precisely because nobody else risks it. Grants access to deeper, more dangerous mine
shafts holding rarer ore veins and the odd buried structure.

`+10% more resources/lv`

The Miner's capstone: a feel for what's underfoot precise enough to map a shaft before
the first swing of the pick.

Can sense ore and gem deposits through solid rock within 5m / Lv.
